name: get_domain_overview
description: Returns a high-level view of a domain's organic footprint: estimated organic traffic, organic keyword count, backlinks, and referring domains. Use this first for domain research; for the detailed ranked-keyword list, call get_domain_keyword_suggestions next. Charges credits (~100-300 typical). Cached for 12 hours per domain.

projectId.description: Required. The OpenSEO project ID to scope this call to. Get one from list_projects.

locationCode.description: DataForSEO location code. Defaults to 2840 (United States). See dataforseo.com/help-center/locations.
